2604.06074.title: Graph-PiT: Enhancing Structural Coherence in Part-Based Image Synthesis via Graph Priors
2604.06074.paper_summary: Achieving fine-grained and structurally sound controllability is a cornerstone of advanced visual generation. Existing part-based frameworks treat user-provided parts as an unordered set and therefore ignore their intrinsic spatial and semantic relationships, which often results in compositions that lack structural integrity. To bridge this gap, we propose Graph-PiT, a framework that explicitly models the structural dependencies of visual components using a graph prior. Specifically, we represent visual parts as nodes and their spatial-semantic relationships as edges. At the heart of our method is a Hierarchical Graph Neural Network (HGNN) module that performs bidirectional message passing between coarse-grained part-level super-nodes and fine-grained IP+ token sub-nodes, refining part embeddings before they enter the generative pipeline. We also introduce a graph Laplacian smoothness loss and an edge-reconstruction loss so that adjacent parts acquire compatible, relation-aware embeddings. Quantitative experiments on controlled synthetic domains (character, product, indoor layout, and jigsaw), together with qualitative transfer to real web images, show that Graph-PiT improves structural coherence over vanilla PiT while remaining compatible with the original IP-Prior pipeline. Ablation experiments confirm that explicit relational reasoning is crucial for enforcing user-specified adjacency constraints. Our approach not only enhances the plausibility of generated concepts but also offers a scalable and interpretable mechanism for complex, multi-part image synthesis. The code is available at https://github.com/wolf-bailang/Graph-PiT.
2604.06074.paper_summary_zh: 達成細粒度且結構合理的可控性是先進視覺生成的基石。現有的基於部件的框架將用戶提供的部件視為無序集合，因此忽略了它們內在的空間和語義關係，這通常導致缺乏結構完整性的組合。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了Graph-PiT，這是一個明確建模視覺組件結構依賴關係的框架，使用圖先驗。具體而言，我們將視覺部件表示為節點，並將它們的空間-語義關係表示為邊。在我們的方法的核心是一個層次圖神經網絡（HGNN）模塊，它在粗粒度部件級超節點和細粒度IP+令牌子節點之間執行雙向消息傳遞，精煉部件嵌入，然後再進入生成管道。我們還引入了一個圖拉普拉斯平滑損失和一個邊重建損失，以便相鄰部件獲得兼容的、關係感知的嵌入。在受控合成領域（字符、產品、室內佈局和拼圖）上的定量實驗，加上對真實網頁圖像的定性轉移，顯示Graph-PiT在保持與原始IP-Prior管道兼容的同時，提高了結構一致性。消融實驗確認了明確的關係推理對於強制用戶指定的相鄰約束至關重要。我們的方法不僅增強了生成概念的合理性，還提供了一種可擴展且可解釋的機制，用於複雜的多部件圖像合成。代碼可在 https://github.com/wolf-bailang/Graph-PiT 獲得。
2604.06074.author: Junbin Zhang et.al.
2604.06074.authors: Junbin Zhang, Meng Cao, Feng Tan, Yikai Lin, Yuexian Zou
